tasks.title: Fix: restore test files deleted by workspace-bot regression (c29643f)
tasks.description: The workspace auto-save bot (AGI Holdings Bot) accidentally committed deletions of 6 test files + events.ts + multicall.ts from the inkd repo in commit c29643f. Restored all files from their original commits. Root cause: workspace-level git add -A ran from within builds/inkd-protocol, picking up unintended deletes.
tasks.result: Restored: events.ts, multicall.ts, events.test.ts, multicall.test.ts, encryption.test.ts (206 lines), InkdClient.connectArweave.test.ts, token.test.ts, watch.test.ts. Quality gate: Contracts 159/159 ✅  SDK 281/281 ✅  CLI 276/276 ✅  Total: 716 tests.

tasks.title: Commit InkdTimelock.sol + full test suite (41 tests, contracts 170→211)
tasks.result: InkdTimelock.sol: 48h admin timelock (queue/execute/cancel/admin handover). InkdTimelock.t.sol: 41 tests — constants, constructor, receive, setPendingAdmin (4), acceptAdmin (5), queueTransaction (8), cancelTransaction (4), executeTransaction (11), 3 integration flows. All edge cases: replay guard, grace period boundary, stale tx, execution failure, ETH forwarding, admin handover flow. Contracts: 170→211 tests. tasks.title: InkdTestToken.t.sol — 0%→100% coverage, 27 tests (contracts 211→238)
tasks.result: InkdTestToken.sol was the only production contract with 0% coverage. Added dedicated test suite: metadata (name/symbol/decimals), supply (totalSupply=1B, deployer balance, TOTAL_SUPPLY constant), ERC-20 transfer + approve + transferFrom, ERC-20Burnable (burn, burnFrom), ERC-2612 Permit (domain separator, nonce, gasless approval via vm.sign, expired deadline + wrong signer reverts), 2 fuzz tests (transfer roundtrip, burn supply). InkdTestToken.sol: 100%/100%/100%/100% stmts/branches/funcs/lines. Note: InkdRegistry.sol L96 and InkdTreasury.sol L23 remain at 0 hits in coverage (both are `_disableInitializers()` in constructors — confirmed Foundry --ir-minimum artifact; guards ARE exercised by tests). Quality gate: Contracts 238/238 ✅ SDK 323/323 ✅ Total: 879 tests.

notes: Deployment infrastructure updated (2026-03-03T23:44): Deploy.s.sol now deploys all 6 contracts including InkdTimelock (admin=deployer); Verify.s.sol prints forge verify-contract for InkdTimelock; POST_DEPLOY.md updated with stale test count fix (79→238), 6-contract checklist, InkdTimelock smoke tests (admin + DELAY), new Step 4.5 (cast send ownership transfers to timelock + verification), DEPLOYED.md + SDK templates updated with timelock address, Emergency Rollback and Notes sections updated. Commit 77bb2a0. All non-blocked tasks done. Blocked: React hooks (needs jsdom/testing-library). SDK: 100% stmts/lines/funcs/branches (perfect coverage achieved 2026-03-03T14:59). CLI: 351 tests; token.ts branch coverage 95.45%→98.48% (mainnet chain ternary lines 227+314 now covered); overall CLI 99.35% stmts/97.36% branch. Contracts: InkdTimelock.sol + InkdTestToken.t.sol committed. Coverage note: InkdRegistry.sol L96 and InkdTreasury.sol L23 (both `_disableInitializers()` in constructors) show 0 hits under --ir-minimum mode — this is a Foundry instrumentation artifact, not a real gap. Remaining uncovered branches: config.ts L106-112 (module-level ANSI noColor ternaries, test env always sets noColor=true), agentd.ts L102 (humanLine else-if false branch — dead code path), index.ts L272-275 (auto-run guard intentionally disabled by INKD_TEST=1), token.ts L46 (parseAddress(!raw) guard — unreachable via public API). DOCS: CONTRACT_REFERENCE.md now fully documents InkdTimelock (added 2026-03-03T20:18). CHANGELOG.md updated with v0.10.1 and v0.10.2 entries. Chore commit b34bfdd: CI split into test-sdk + test-cli jobs, sdk@0.10.0 version bump, .gitignore now blocks workspace files (AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, etc.) from being committed, coverage + dist synced. IMPORTANT: workspace auto-save bot must not run git add -A from builds/inkd-protocol — workspace files now gitignored as safeguard. Also fixed QUICKSTART.md stale '63 tests' comment. Commit a39b6ee.
